description_long: This is a two-story suburban house surrounded by a white picket fence and a modest yard with several trees and shrubs. The house features a gray, multi-faceted hip roof with visible shingle textures and beige siding on the exterior walls. The backyard includes a concrete patio area with a basketball hoop, a swing set, a picnic table, and a barbecue grill, suggesting a family-friendly environment. A driveway on one side leads to a parked car, and the front of the house has a covered porch with outdoor seating. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on both floors, and the main entryway is accentuated by a small overhang and steps. The overall setting is typical of a residential neighborhood, with clear boundaries and outdoor amenities.
description: A beige two-story suburban house with a gray hip roof, white picket fence, and a landscaped yard featuring trees, a patio, and a driveway with a car.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the backyard with a basketball hoop, swing set, picnic table, barbecue grill, and dense greenery along the fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway with a parked car, the swing set, and the side entrance to the backyard.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the covered porch with seating, main entryway, and the driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more of the fenced yard, additional trees, and the gate leading into the backyard.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, overhang, and a single main door flanked by windows
